data.body: EPIC jira-reb-687 — SESSION SUMMARY. DELIVERED: 7 commits on feat/llm-failure-handling, ALL pre-commit-hook green (lint+typecheck) + plan-review PASS + claimed in_progress: 278fedf32 debug-fix(bug sportful-starred-meerkat, FIXED here), a63ae39cc arawana(RED baseline matrix), ed47d9289 mamba(classifier failure.py: ResolutionClass/LLMOutcome/classify_llm_failure/sanitize_diagnostic + metadata-only runner .outcome), 4c5e03d89 arcticduck(transport retry: _build_retrying_anthropic_model, SDK max_retries=0, LLMConfig.llm_retry_max_attempts/wait_s, ADR0037), 2b72bf60a hoopoe(liveness: httpx read timeout via arcticduck seam + Agent tool_timeout async-only + LLMConfig.llm_tool_timeout_s, ADR0038), 8d7d260e3 drake(silent-success NativeOutput check_stop_reason parity + json_repair schema= + faulty-output reask; #5221 deferred to follow-on 8303), 2e037c9fc anole(agent-build invariants: model.profile.supports_tools check + usage-plausibility warning). 6/7 CHILDREN DONE. REMAINING: (A) blackbear INTEGRATOR — review iter2 BLOCK(12), precise remediation notes in its ticket comment; large impl (3 verdict schemas coverage.resolution_class/diagnostic, 4 CLI exit-11 sites, sign_manifest never-sign guard + pre-sign fingerprint recheck, exit-codes.md amend + test_exit_codes.py, 4 ADRs, MCP structured return, session-log diagnostic, final runner.py reconcile). (B) GERRIT LANDING: git fetch origin && rebase origin/main (advanced 965fd9ee+), re-run CI triad, push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 per change, close children bottom-first after Verified+1 (remediate completion-verifier), close bug meerkat --reason, close epic, submit TOP (POST /a/changes/N/submit as RebarBotNava). Side bugs OPEN: succinct-formable-kite, middle-actinium-thrush. KEY PROCESS: review dependent children with --ref HEAD; claim while attestation valid; config on LLMConfig; commit with venv active.
